description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook. After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.

outputs.description: Whether the domain is registered. Domain.WHOIS.NameServers The name servers.
outputs.name: Domain.WHOIS.DomainStatus

outputs.description: The registrant email. Domain.WHOIS.Registrant.Phone The registrant phone.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The registrar name. Domain.WHOIS.Registrar.Url The registrar email.
outputs.name: Domain.WHOIS.Registrar.Name

outputs.description: The registrar organization name. Domain.WHOIS.Registrar.Id The registrar ID.
outputs.name: Domain.WHOIS.Registrar.Organization

outputs.description: The Admin name. Domain.WHOIS.Admin.Email The Admin email.
outputs.name: Domain.WHOIS.Admin.Name
